# Autogenerated by sys2syz

include <fcntl.h>
include <ioccom.h>
include <sys/types.h>
include <dev/io/iodev.h>

resource fd_io[fd]

openat$io(fd const[AT_FDCWD], file ptr[in, string["/dev/io"]], flags flags[open_flags], mode const[0]) fd_io

ioctl$IODEV_PIO(fd fd_io, cmd const[IODEV_PIO], arg ptr[inout, iodev_pio_req])

iodev_pio_req {
	access	flags[iodev_pio_flags, int32]
	port	int32
	width	int32
	val	int32
}

iodev_pio_flags = IODEV_PIO_READ, IODEV_PIO_WRITE
